props.name: blur
props.description: Enables a blur effect during the animation.

props.name: duration
props.description: Specifies the duration of the fade animation in seconds.

props.name: delay
props.description: Adds a delay in seconds before triggering the animation.

props.name: ease
props.description: GSAP easing function for the fade animation.

props.name: threshold
props.description: IntersectionObserver threshold for triggering the fade animation.

props.name: initialOpacity
props.description: The starting opacity of the component before it enters the viewport.

props.name: className
props.description: Custom class(es) to be added to the container.

props.name: disappearAfter
props.description: Time in seconds after which the content will start to disappear. Disables if set to 0.

props.name: disappearDuration
props.description: Duration of the disappearance animation in seconds.

props.name: disappearEase
props.description: GSAP easing function for the disappearance animation.
